ham.subject: Quarterly IT Security Training – March 2026
ham.body:
Dear Team,

Our annual IT Security Awareness Training for Q1 2026 is now available. Please log in to the learning portal and complete the 45‑minute module before May 15, 2026.

Key Topics:
- Phishing & Social Engineering
- Password Management
- Secure Remote Work Practices
- Incident Reporting Procedures

To access the training, click here: <URL>

If you encounter any issues, reply to this email or contact the IT Help Desk at it‑support@company.com.

Thank you for keeping our data safe!

Best Regards,
IT Security Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Office 365 Account Compromised – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Employee,

This is an emergency notice from the Office 365 Security Team. Our automated monitoring has detected a suspicious login attempt to your account (user@company.com). If not addressed, the account will be permanently disabled to protect corporate data.

Please verify your identity and reset your password within the next 15 minutes by clicking the link below:

<URL>

Failure to comply will result in account suspension and potential security breaches. For a safe re‑activation, complete the verification immediately.

Thank you,

Microsoft 365 Security Team
Support: 1‑800‑123‑4567
